Movie.title: Movie
Movie.description: Represents a movie or show entry with its link and category.

link.description: The telegram or external link to the content

category.description: Category like Movie, CID, Bachelor Point, etc.

isPremium.description: Whether this content requires a subscription

User.title: User
User.description: Stores telegram user data and subscription status.

/movies/{movieId}.description: Collection of all movies and shows.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles synced from Telegram.
